structured_payload_candidate.title: Deadband Mode Damper Control
structured_payload_candidate.summary: When Zone State is deadband, the active cold duct airflow setpoint is the minimum endpoint. The cold duct damper modulates to maintain measured cold duct airflow at setpoint. The hot duct damper is closed.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Zone State is deadband
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Active cold duct airflow setpoint = minimum endpoint. Cold duct damper modulates to maintain measured cold duct airflow at setpoint. Hot duct damper closed.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: b. When the Zone State is deadband, the active cold duct airflow setpoint shall be the minimum endpoint. The cold duct damper shall be modulated by a control loop to maintain the measured cold duct airflow at the active cold duct airflow setpoint. The hot duct damper shall be closed.

evidence_quote: b. When the Zone State is deadband, the active cold duct airflow setpoint shall be the minimum endpoint. The cold duct damper shall be modulated by a control loop to maintain the measured cold duct airflow at the active cold duct airflow setpoint. The hot duct damper shall be closed.
evidence_text: b. When the Zone State is deadband, the active cold duct airflow setpoint shall be the minimum endpoint. The cold duct damper shall be modulated by a control loop to maintain the measured cold duct airflow at the active cold duct airflow setpoint. The hot duct damper shall be closed.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Heating Mode Damper Control
structured_payload_candidate.summary: When Zone State is heating, the Heating Loop output resets the active hot duct airflow setpoint from zero to heating maximum endpoint. The hot duct damper modulates to maintain measured hot duct airflow at setpoint. The active cold duct airflow setpoint is the minimum endpoint, and the cooling damper modulates to maintain measured cold duct airflow at setpoint. If hot duct supply air temperature is less than room temperature, the hot duct damper is closed.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Zone State is heating
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Heating Loop output resets active hot duct airflow setpoint from zero to heating maximum endpoint. Hot duct damper modulates to maintain measured hot duct airflow at setpoint. Active cold duct airflow setpoint = minimum endpoint; cooling damper modulates to maintain measured cold duct airflow at setpoint. If hot duct supply air temperature < room temperature, hot duct damper closed.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: c. When the Zone State is heating: 1. The Heating Loop output shall reset the active hot duct airflow setpoint from zero to heating maximum endpoint. The hot duct damper shall be modulated by a control loop to maintain the measured hot duct airflow at the active hot duct airflow setpoint. 2. The active cold duct airflow setpoint shall be the minimum endpoint. The cooling damper shall be modulated by a control loop to maintain the measured cold duct airflow at active cold duct airflow setpoint. 3. If hot duct supply air temperature from the air handler is less than room temperature, the hot duct damper shall be closed.

evidence_quote: c. When the Zone State is heating: 1. The Heating Loop output shall reset the active hot duct airflow setpoint from zero to heating maximum endpoint. The hot duct damper shall be modulated by a control loop to maintain the measured hot duct airflow at the active hot duct airflow setpoint. 2. The active cold duct airflow setpoint shall be the minimum endpoint. The cooling damper shall be modulated by a control loop to maintain the measured cold duct airflow at active cold duct airflow setpoint. 3. If hot duct supply air temperature from the air handler is less than room temperature, the hot duct damper shall be closed.
evidence_text: c. When the Zone State is heating: 1. The Heating Loop output shall reset the active hot duct airflow setpoint from zero to heating maximum endpoint. The hot duct damper shall be modulated by a control loop to maintain the measured hot duct airflow at the active hot duct airflow setpoint. 2. The active cold duct airflow setpoint shall be the minimum endpoint. The cooling damper shall be modulated by a control loop to maintain the measured cold duct airflow at active cold duct airflow setpoint. 3. If hot duct supply air temperature from the air handler is less than room temperature, the hot duct damper shall be closed.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Override to Prevent Backflow – Heating Damper
structured_payload_candidate.section_title: Overriding Section 5.14.5.1 Logic (to Avoid Backflow from One Duct to the Other)
structured_payload_candidate.summary: If the heating air handler is not proven ON, the heating damper shall be closed.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Heating air handler is not proven ON
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: a. If heating air handler is not proven ON, the heating damper shall be closed.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Low Airflow Alarm – 70% Threshold
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Generate a Level 4 alarm if measured airflow is less than 70% of setpoint for 10 minutes while setpoint is greater than zero.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Measured airflow < 70% of setpoint for 10 minutes AND setpoint > 0
structured_payload_candidate.fault_condition: Measured airflow < 70% of setpoint for 10 minutes while setpoint > 0
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: a. If the measured airflow is less than 70% of setpoint for 10 minutes while setpoint is greater than zero, generate a Level 4 alarm.

evidence_quote: a. If the measured airflow is less than 70% of setpoint for 10 minutes while setpoint is greater than zero, generate a Level 4 alarm.
evidence_text: a. If the measured airflow is less than 70% of setpoint for 10 minutes while setpoint is greater than zero, generate a Level 4 alarm.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Low Airflow Alarm – 50% Threshold
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Generate a Level 4 alarm if measured airflow is less than 50% of setpoint for 10 minutes while setpoint is greater than zero.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Measured airflow < 50% of setpoint for 10 minutes AND setpoint > 0
structured_payload_candidate.fault_condition: Measured airflow < 50% of setpoint for 10 minutes while setpoint > 0
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: b. If the measured airflow is less than 50% of setpoint for 10 minutes while setpoint is greater than zero, generate a Level 4 alarm.

evidence_quote: b. If the measured airflow is less than 50% of setpoint for 10 minutes while setpoint is greater than zero, generate a Level 4 alarm.
evidence_text: b. If the measured airflow is less than 50% of setpoint for 10 minutes while setpoint is greater than zero, generate a Level 4 alarm.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Low Airflow Alarm Suppression for Zones with Importance-Multiplier of 0
structured_payload_candidate.summary: If a zone has an Importance-Multiplier of 0 for its static pressure reset T&R control loop, low airflow alarms shall be suppressed for that zone.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Zone Importance-Multiplier = 0 for static pressure reset T&R control loop
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Suppress low airflow alarms for that zone.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: c. If a zone has an Importance-Multiplier of 0 (see Section 5.1.14.2.a.1) for its static pressure reset T&R control loop, low airflow alarms shall be suppressed for that zone.

evidence_quote: c. If a zone has an Importance-Multiplier of 0 (see Section 5.1.14.2.a.1) for its static pressure reset T&R control loop, low airflow alarms shall be suppressed for that zone.
evidence_text: c. If a zone has an Importance-Multiplier of 0 (see Section 5.1.14.2.a.1) for its static pressure reset T&R control loop, low airflow alarms shall be suppressed for that zone.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Airflow Sensor Calibration Alarm
structured_payload_candidate.summary: If the fan serving the zone is off and airflow sensor reading is above the larger of 10% of the maximum airflow setpoint or 50 cfm for 30 minutes, generate a Level 3 alarm.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Fan serving zone is off AND airflow sensor reading > max(10% of maximum airflow setpoint, 50 cfm) for 30 minutes
structured_payload_candidate.fault_condition: Airflow sensor reading above threshold while fan is off for 30 minutes
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: If the fan serving the zone is off and airflow sensor reading is above the larger of 10% of the maximum airflow setpoint or 50 cfm for 30 minutes, generate a Level 3 alarm.

evidence_quote: If the fan serving the zone is off and airflow sensor reading is above the larger of 10% of the maximum airflow setpoint or 50 cfm for 30 minutes, generate a Level 3 alarm.
evidence_text: If the fan serving the zone is off and airflow sensor reading is above the larger of 10% of the maximum airflow setpoint or 50 cfm for 30 minutes, generate a Level 3 alarm.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Leaking Damper Alarm
structured_payload_candidate.summary: If the damper position is 0% and airflow sensor reading is above the larger of 10% of the cooling maximum airflow setpoint or 50 cfm for 10 minutes while the fan serving the damper is proven ON, generate a Level 4 alarm.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Damper position = 0% AND airflow sensor reading > max(10% of cooling maximum airflow setpoint, 50 cfm) for 10 minutes AND fan serving damper is proven ON
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: If the damper position is 0%, and airflow sensor reading is above the larger of 10% of the cooling maximum airflow setpoint or 50 cfm for 10 minutes while the fan serving the damper is proven ON, generate a Level 4 alarm.

evidence_quote: If the damper position is 0%, and airflow sensor reading is above the larger of 10% of the cooling maximum airflow setpoint or 50 cfm for 10 minutes while the fan serving the damper is proven ON, generate a Level 4 alarm.
evidence_text: If the damper position is 0%, and airflow sensor reading is above the larger of 10% of the cooling maximum airflow setpoint or 50 cfm for 10 minutes while the fan serving the damper is proven ON, generate a Level 4 alarm.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Testing/Commissioning Overrides
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Provide software switches interlocked to a system level point to force zone airflow setpoint to zero, Vcool-max, Vmin, Vheat-max; force cooling damper full closed/open; force heating damper full closed/open; and reset request-hours accumulator point to zero.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Commissioning override activated
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Software switches allow forcing airflow setpoints and damper positions, and resetting request-hours accumulator.
structured_payload_candidate.commissioning_check: Provide software switches that interlock to a system level point to force zone airflow setpoint to zero, force zone airflow setpoint to Vcool-max, force zone airflow setpoint to Vmin, force zone airflow setpoint to Vheat-max, force cooling damper full closed/open, force heating damper full closed/open, and reset request-hours accumulator point to zero.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: Provide software switches that interlock to a system level point to a. force zone airflow setpoint to zero, b. force zone airflow setpoint to Vcool-max, c. force zone airflow setpoint to Vmin, d. force zone airflow setpoint to Vheat-max, e. force cooling damper full closed/open, f. force heating damper full closed/open, and g. reset request-hours accumulator point to zero (provide one point for each reset type listed in the next section).

evidence_quote: Provide software switches that interlock to a system level point to a. force zone airflow setpoint to zero, b. force zone airflow setpoint to Vcool-max, c. force zone airflow setpoint to Vmin, d. force zone airflow setpoint to Vheat-max, e. force cooling damper full closed/open, f. force heating damper full closed/open, and g. reset request-hours accumulator point to zero (provide one point for each reset type listed in the next section).
evidence_text: Provide software switches that interlock to a system level point to a. force zone airflow setpoint to zero, b. force zone airflow setpoint to Vcool-max, c. force zone airflow setpoint to Vmin, d. force zone airflow setpoint to Vheat-max, e. force cooling damper full closed/open, f. force heating damper full closed/open, and g. reset request-hours accumulator point to zero (provide one point for each reset type listed in the next section).

structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Zone temperature > cooling setpoint + 3°C (5°F) for 2 minutes AND after suppression period due to setpoint change
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: a. If the zone temperature exceeds the zone’s cooling setpoint by 3°C (5°F) for 2 minutes and after suppression period due to setpoint change per Section 5.1.20, send 3 requests.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Endpoints as a Function of Zone Group Mode
structured_payload_candidate.section_title: Active endpoints used in the control logic depicted in Figure 5.14.5 shall vary depending on the mode of the Zone Group the zone is a part of (see Table 5.14.4).
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Table 5.14.4 defines the active endpoints for cooling maximum, minimum, and heating maximum airflow setpoints based on Zone Group mode (Occupied, Cooldown, Setup, Warmup, Setback, Unoccupied).
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Zone Group mode
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Cooling maximum: Vcool-max in Occupied, Cooldown, Setup; 0 in Warmup, Setback, Unoccupied. Minimum: Vmin* in Occupied; 0 in all other modes. Heating maximum: Vheat-max in Occupied, Warmup, Setback; 0 in Cooldown, Setup, Unoccupied.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote:
Table 5.14.4 Endpoints as a Function of Zone Group Mode
Setpoint Occupied Cooldown Setup Warmup Setback Unoccupied
Cooling maximum Vcool-max Vcool-max Vcool-max 0 0 0
Minimum Vmin* 0 0 0 0 0
Heating maximum Vheat-max 0 0 Vheat-max Vheat-max 0

evidence_quote:
Table 5.14.4 Endpoints as a Function of Zone Group Mode
Setpoint Occupied Cooldown Setup Warmup Setback Unoccupied
Cooling maximum Vcool-max Vcool-max Vcool-max 0 0 0
Minimum Vmin* 0 0 0 0 0
Heating maximum Vheat-max 0 0 Vheat-max Vheat-max 0
evidence_text:
Table 5.14.4 Endpoints as a Function of Zone Group Mode
Setpoint Occupied Cooldown Setup Warmup Setback Unoccupied
Cooling maximum Vcool-max Vcool-max Vcool-max 0 0 0
Minimum Vmin* 0 0 0 0 0
Heating maximum Vheat-max 0 0 Vheat-max Vheat-max 0
